user_parameters_schema.description: Configure your WhatsApp endpoint for this enrollment

api_key_secret.description: Name of the customer secret containing your WhatsApp Cloud API access token
api_key_secret.title: Access Token Secret Name

to_phone_secret.description: Name of the customer secret containing the recipient phone number
to_phone_secret.title: Recipient Phone Secret Name

webhook_base_url_secret.description: Name of the customer secret containing the base URL of your WhatsApp server (e.g. https://hooks.slack.com)
webhook_base_url_secret.title: Webhook Base URL Secret Name

webhook_path_secret.description: Name of the customer secret containing the webhook path (e.g. /v17.0/{phone_number_id}/messages)
webhook_path_secret.title: Webhook Path Secret Name

user_parameters_schema.title: WhatsApp Transformer Configuration

api_key_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the customer secret holding your WhatsApp Cloud API access token

to_phone_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the customer secret holding the recipient phone number

webhook_base_url_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the customer secret that holds the base URL (scheme + host) of your WhatsApp webhook

webhook_path_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the customer secret that holds the webhook path
